---
output:
  html_document:
    theme: yeti
    highlight: tango
---

______________________________________________________________________________________

![](C:/Users/reidh/Documents/GitHub/rhaefer.github.io/images/hood.jpg)

_Approaching the Pearly Gates on Mount Hood (2016)_

______________________________________________________________________________________

<a href='https://photos.google.com/share/AF1QipO1eg7NQoUdgBhfEPdOtTgSUy3YtR8HtZpdcb-htmiiHb-3IIccqIqm9NYcOd16Jw?key=aS1YRXF3UE8yZjRpeXZ5R05UUFJjRVZWS2NPX1hB&source=ctrlq.org'><img src='https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/UjK8Znv8dbij7puVVQSZcQ2vB8f3qH79ates5HPfaubRciyC4XKZ53IDTgRGTjzwjh52nnrSDQtDB30QrlzyNl_NNTFSms0l_QBRI23CNffOgyb98Djkymd0cm7OPEYKVnxoVdkYTg=w2400' /></a>



_The oldest public park in the United State (2018)_
